message:
runtime+conformance: close WAIT/WAITAOF timeout/local invalid-arg gaps (bd-1nj5)

Why:
- WAIT/WAITAOF runtime argument parsing already rejects non-numeric and negative thresholds, but test/fixture coverage still missed timeout and WAITAOF local-threshold invalid paths.
- Conformance should assert these error contracts explicitly in both packet and generic error suites.

What changed:
- `crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs`
  - Extended `fr_p2c_006_u005_wait_requires_arity_and_integer_args` with invalid timeout (`WAIT 1 -1`).
  - Added `fr_p2c_006_u006_waitaof_rejects_invalid_integer_arguments` for invalid local (`WAITAOF nope 1 0`) and invalid timeout (`WAITAOF 1 0 -1`).
- `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_errors.json`
  - Added `wait_invalid_timeout`
  - Added `waitaof_invalid_local_integer`
  - Added `waitaof_invalid_timeout`

Validation:
- `cargo fmt --all && cargo fmt --check`
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets`
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-runtime -- --nocapture`
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture`
- `ubs crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/core_errors.json` (exit 0)
- `ubs crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs` (non-zero due pre-existing scanner findings in this long-lived file; compile/test gates above are green for this slice)

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-1nj5
- Mail thread: br-1nj5
